property_description: The caster immediately leaves play, leaving behind a body-sized physrep at their current location. They then may go to their cabin and collect their Guardian costuming, and return to their body. They immediately teleport in on a three count as their guardian, possessed as per the Taskmaster ability.
property_limitations: Can only be used on a guardian bound to the current user.

property_description: Guardian no longer possesses said player. The player may then go to their cabin, collect their costuming, and return to their body. They immediately teleport in on a three count as themselves, no longer possessed.
property_limitations: If the player/guardian is not cooperative (or unconscious) the target for success increases by 1 point (up to a maximum of 6).

property_description: The caster selects a subdued or helpless creature and tames it permanently, adding it to his bound guardians.
property_limitations: Fails automatically on Players, Bound Guardians, or Monsters of a CL above 1

property_description: Must name a specific being during the ritual. The ritual allows the caster to sense where the named being has recently been and the direction that it traveled for 1 hour.
property_limitations: Fails automatically on Players, Bound Guardians, or Monsters of a CL above 1

property_description: The bound player has taken excellent care of their guardian. This ritual "checks" to see if the guardian has grown any stronger since it was originally bound.
property_limitations: May only be used on Bound guardians that have been bonded to the same player for a minimum of three events. Fails automatically on Players, Bound Guardians, or Monsters of a CL above 1. May only be successfully cast of any given guardian once.

property_description: This ritual allows the caster to give a guardian 1 life force, allowing them to resurrect once.
property_limitations: Guardians may only have 1 life force.

property_description:
The bound player has taken excellent care of their guardian. This ritual "checks" to see if the guardian has grown any stronger since it was originally bound. 

Upcast: Increases the maximum hp of a bound guardian by 10 and its damage by 2
property_limitations: May only be used on Bound guardians that have been bonded for a minimum of three events. Fails automatically on Players, Bound Guardians, or Monsters of a CL above 2. May only be successfully cast of any given guardian once.

property_description:
This ritual allows the caster to give a guardian 1 life force, allowing them to resurrect once.

Upcast: You do not lose essence when your guardian dies during possession. Your guardian loses its essence instead.
property_limitations: Guardians may only have 1 life force.
